description: Look-and-feel polish pass on the ROADMAP branch (rc-dock based). Fix duplicate panel headers, collapsed dock content, light-theme leak from rc-dock, blocking Octave modal, tiny default window, and ghost tabs. See tasks/prd-matslop-polish.md for the narrative PRD with root-cause findings. IMPORTANT: this branch is based on ralph/matslop-roadmap (42 stories already merged). The codebase uses rc-dock via src/renderer/panels/MatslopDockLayout.tsx, NOT Allotment. If you find both, rc-dock is the live one.

userStories.title: Remove legacy PanelHeader from every dock-hosted panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want exactly one header per dock pane (the rc-dock tab header), not two stacked headers. Inspection showed FileBrowser, EditorPanel, WorkspacePanel, CommandWindow, etc. each render their own <PanelHeader> on top of rc-dock's tab strip.
acceptanceCriteria: PanelHeader import/usage removed from every panel hosted inside MatslopDockLayout: FileBrowser, EditorPanel, WorkspacePanel, CommandWindow, CommandHistoryPanel, CallStackPanel, WatchesPanel, FigurePanel, HelpPanel, FindInFilesPanel, ProfilerPanel, SourceControlPanel
PanelHeader.tsx is kept only if DetachedPanel (outside rc-dock) still needs it; otherwise it is deleted
The pane still shows its title in rc-dock's tab strip via DOCK_TAB_TITLES in MatslopDockLayout.tsx
Playwright smoke: only one element matching a panel's title text per pane
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix dock tab content sizing so panels fill their pane
userStories.description: As a user, I want every panel to fill the full area of the dock pane it lives in, not collapse to intrinsic content size leaving ugly gray voids. Inspection showed MatslopDockLayout.tsx loadTab() wraps tab content in display:flex without giving child flex:1, so .panel shrinks to its intrinsic width.
acceptanceCriteria: In MatslopDockLayout.tsx the tab-content wrapper at loadTab() either drops display:flex or gives its child flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; min-height: 0
.panel selector in styles.css gets width: 100% alongside height: 100%
Resizing the window stretches file-tree, monaco editor, workspace table, and command window to fill their pane with no gray void on the right or bottom
Playwright: dock-tab-matslop-file-browser bounding box equals its parent rc-dock panel bounding box within 2px on all four sides
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace rc-dock light CSS with project dark theme
userStories.description: As a user, I want dock panels to match the project's dark theme instead of rendering with rc-dock's default light chrome. Inspection showed MatslopDockLayout.tsx imports rc-dock/dist/rc-dock.css (light), overriding the project's CSS vars inside the dock tree.
acceptanceCriteria: Import changed from rc-dock/dist/rc-dock.css to rc-dock/dist/rc-dock-dark.css OR a new src/renderer/rc-dock-theme.css maps every rc-dock selector (.dock-tab, .dock-panel, .dock-bar, .dock-nav-wrap, .dock-divider, .dock-drop-indicator) to CSS variables (--bg-panel, --bg-header, --border-color, --text-primary, --accent-color)
Dark theme is the visible default at first launch
Switching to light theme via data-theme='light' still works
Playwright: screenshot of main window in dark mode has no contiguous #f3f3f3 or #ffffff region larger than 100x100 pixels inside the dock area
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Make 'Octave Not Found' non-blocking (banner, not modal)
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want to see the MatSlop UI on launch even if Octave isn't detected yet. Currently a modal blocks interaction on every launch.
acceptanceCriteria: On launch with no detected Octave, the full dock layout mounts and a dismissible warning banner appears above the status bar with a short message, a 'Browse for octave-cli...' button, and a 'Dismiss' button
The previous modal dialog is removed from the first-run path (still reachable from Preferences > Octave path)
Running an Octave-dependent command with no path set shows an inline error in the Command Window, not a modal
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Maximize or honor work-area size on first launch
userStories.description: As a user, I want MatSlop to open at a reasonable size on first launch instead of a small centered box.
acceptanceCriteria: BrowserWindow creation in src/main/index.ts uses screen.getPrimaryDisplay().workAreaSize for default width/height (capped at 1920x1200) OR calls win.maximize() before first show
User-resized dimensions still persist across launches via existing window-state persistence
E2E tests that set their own viewport are not affected (process.env.E2E guard if needed)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Remove stale Command History ghost tab
userStories.description: As a user, I don't want a disconnected Command History tab floating over the Command Window when Command History is not visible. Inspection screenshot matslop-06.png shows this ghost tab at ~(150, 320).
acceptanceCriteria: buildDockLayoutFromVisibility in MatslopDockLayout.tsx never emits a Command History tab entry unless visibility.commandHistory is true
Saved-layout hydration (US-026 path) drops unknown or hidden tab ids from the loaded LayoutBase before passing it to rc-dock
Playwright: launching with default visibility shows zero elements with data-testid='dock-tab-matslop-command-history'
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Initial dock sizes use flex weights, not fixed pixels
userStories.description: As a user, I want the three-column dock to split proportionally as the window resizes. Current sizes (220/900/280) sum to 1400 which is the legacy window width, so wider windows leave dead space.
acceptanceCriteria: In buildDockLayoutFromVisibility the column size fields are chosen so rc-dock distributes leftover space to the editor column proportionally
At 1920x1080 File Browser is ~15%, Editor+Command column ~65%, Workspace column ~20%, with no unused space
Resizing the window shrinks/grows the center column proportionally
Existing 'reset layout' preset still places panels in the Phase 1 positions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Audit every .panel child for width: 100%; height: 100%
userStories.description: As a developer, I need every panel's root element to propagate full width/height to its content (Monaco, file tree, xterm, grid) so no sub-component collapses independently.
acceptanceCriteria: All panel root elements and their direct .panel-content children set width: 100%; height: 100%; min-width: 0; min-height: 0
EditorPanel Monaco wrapper explicitly sizes to 100%/100% and Monaco auto-layout fills the pane
CommandWindow xterm element fills its pane and FitAddon still triggers on resize
WorkspacePanel grid fills its pane horizontally
Playwright screenshot at 1920x1080: no empty #252526-over-nothing rectangles larger than 4px inside any dock pane
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Style pass on rc-dock tab strips to match project theme
userStories.description: As a user, I want the dock tab strips to use the project's accent color and typography, not rc-dock defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: Active tab underline uses --accent-color (#007acc)
Tab font size and padding match the existing status bar (12px, system UI font)
Inactive tabs use --text-secondary; active tab uses --text-bright
Hover state uses --bg-hover
Close-tab X in the dock-bar still works (only legacy per-panel inner X is removed in US-P01)
Any leftover checkbox glyph next to tab titles (visible in current screenshots) is removed
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Visual-regression Playwright spec for polished layout
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a Playwright test that renders the default layout at a known viewport and fails if anything regresses visually.
acceptanceCriteria: New spec tests/e2e/visual-polish.spec.ts launches at 1600x1000, waits for dock idle, takes a fullPage screenshot
Test asserts no contiguous #f3f3f3 or #ffffff region larger than 100x100 inside the dock area
Test asserts every data-testid^='dock-tab-' element has bounding box equal to its parent panel content area
Baseline screenshot committed to repo
Test runs in CI
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
